variants.banner: Brand deals living in your DMs and notes app? That's money slipping away.
variants.heading: Stop losing deals you already closed.
variants.body: When pitches, contracts and invoices are spread across five apps, deals fall through. CreatorKhata keeps every brand deal in one pipeline — pitch to payment.

variants.banner: Done with the deal but still chasing the payment? Let the invoice chase for you.
variants.heading: The deal isn't done until you're paid.
variants.body: Send GST-ready invoices and track every payment in one place. CreatorKhata flags what's overdue so you stop doing follow-up math in your head.

variants.banner: Still guessing what to charge brands? You're probably undercharging.
variants.heading: Charge what your audience is actually worth.
variants.body: Most creators undercharge because they're guessing. CreatorKhata builds a rate card from your real numbers — so your next quote is backed by data, not nerves.

variants.banner: Notes app, sheets, WhatsApp, email — your brand deal is in five places at once.
variants.heading: Your whole brand-deal business, in one place.
variants.body: Deals, contracts, invoices, rate cards and payment tracking — all in one app instead of scattered across five. Everything in one khata.

variants.banner: A 'yes' in your DMs isn't a contract — and it costs you when the deal changes.
variants.heading: Send a real contract, not a handshake.
variants.body: Lock the deliverables, timeline and payment terms before you start. CreatorKhata generates a proper creator contract in minutes — no lawyer, no template hunting.

variants.banner: GST on a brand deal trips up most Indian creators. It shouldn't.
variants.heading: GST-correct invoices, built for India.
variants.body: The moment your deals get real, GST shows up. CreatorKhata generates invoices that get the numbers right for Indian creators — so the brand's finance team has nothing to bounce back.

variants.banner: The deal isn't done when they say yes. It's done when you're paid.
variants.heading: From pitch to payment, in one flow.
variants.body: Pitch the brand, lock the contract, send the invoice, track the payment — without switching apps once. That single flow is the whole point of CreatorKhata.

variants.banner: Staring at a blank caption box again? Let the AI write it for you.
variants.heading: AI writes your captions, pitches & posts.
variants.body: CreatorKhata's AI drafts your captions, turns one video into 8 ready-to-post formats, and writes your brand-pitch emails — so you create instead of staring at a blank screen.
